source_pr.title: planner: fix bug that window function do not check ignore nulls.
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
fix #10556 

### What is changed and how it works?
Add a simple judgment.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Code changes

 - None

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: sql: "SELECT NTH_VALUE(a, 1) FROM LAST over (partition by b order by b), a FROM t1;", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "SELECT NTH_VALUE(a, 1) FROM LAST over (partition by b order by b), a FROM t1;", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "SELECT NTH_VALUE(a, 1) FROM LAST over (partition by b order by b), a FROM t1;", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
